project.component: { "keyToString": { ".NET 启动设置配置文件.YayZent.Abp.Web: Doro.Abp.Web.executor": "Run", ".NET 启动设置配置文件.YayZent.Abp.Web: http.executor": "Run", ".NET 启动设置配置文件.YayZent.Abp.Web: https.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "XThreadsFramesViewSplitterKey": "0.877451", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "grid.search.filter.rows": "true", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "settings.sync", "settings.editor.splitter.proportion": "0.3058104", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }
